THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REMMICH, MARVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VOLLMAYER, WILLIAM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 160 BEULAH STREET(BASEMENT AREA),SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, PROVIDED THAT DEFENDANT VACATES THE PROPERTY AND RETURNS THE KEYS TO PLAINTIFF PRIOR TO NOON ON AUGUST 8, 1995, PLAINTIFF AGREES TO VACATE THIS JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THE CASE WITH PRE JUDICE. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN FEES AND COSTS.AS TO ADDTIONTIONAL CONDITIONS, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
